info.title: Verana Indexer API
info.description: REST API for the Verana indexer: trust registries (TR), credential schemas (CS), permissions, trust deposits (TD), metrics, and indexer meta.

get.description: Return the latest block height that has been fully processed by the indexer.

200.description: Current indexed block height

height.description: The latest block height that has been fully processed by the indexer

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the checkpoint was last updated (ISO 8601 format without milliseconds)

get.description: Replay persisted trust registry, credential schema, and permission indexer events after a block height. Use the did query parameter to return only events related to a DID.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: DID to replay events for. Only rows persisted for this DID are returned.

parameters.name: after_block_height
parameters.description: Return events with block_height greater than this value.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return.

200.description: Indexer transaction events

get.summary: Get indexer version and environment info
get.description: Return the indexer version and network environment configuration details.

200.description: Indexer version and environment information

get.description: Return the current operational status of the indexer, including whether it is running, whether crawling is active, and any error information if crawling or the indexer has stopped. This endpoint is useful for monitoring and debugging indexer issues.

200.description: Indexer status information

is_running.description: Whether the indexer service is running. If false, all APIs will return 503.

is_crawling.description: Whether the indexer is actively crawling new blocks and transactions. If false, APIs remain available but no new data is being indexed.

stopped_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the indexer or crawling stopped (if applicable)

stopped_reason.description: Human-readable reason why crawling or the indexer stopped (if applicable)
stopped_reason.example: Crawling stopped due to: Unknown Verana message types: /verana.perm.v1.MsgCreateRootPermission. Indexer APIs remain available.

last_error.description: Details about the last error that caused crawling or indexer to stop (if applicable)

stack.example:
Error: Unknown Verana message types...
    at ...

service.description: Service name where the error occurred

example.stopped_reason: Crawling stopped due to: Unknown Verana message types: /verana.perm.v1.MsgCreateRootPermission. Indexer APIs remain available.

X-Crawling-Reason.description: Reason why crawling stopped (only present when crawling is stopped)

schema.example: Crawling stopped due to: Unknown Verana message types...

X-Crawling-Error.description: Error message that caused crawling to stop (only present when crawling is stopped)

X-Crawling-Stopped-At.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when crawling stopped (only present when crawling is stopped)

get.summary: List entity changes at a block height
get.description: Return all indexed entity changes for the requested block height.

parameters.name: block_height
parameters.description: The block height to query changes for. Must be a positive integer not exceeding the current indexed block height.

200.description: Entity changes recorded at the requested block height

next_change_at.description: The next block height greater than the requested block_height that has any indexed change events. Null when there is no later change.

activity.description: List of activity items at this block height (same format as history endpoints)

get.description: Retrieve a specific Trust Registry by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Trust Registry ID to retrieve

200.description: Successful response with Trust Registry details

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Trust Registries with optional filtering

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: only_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status. If true, returns only active trust registries (archived is null). If false, returns only archived trust registries (archived is not null). If omitted, returns all trust registries (both active and archived). Active/inactive is determined by the archived field (null for active, timestamp for archived).

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: Participant account. TRs where this account is TR corporation or holds an active permission on a schema in the TR.

parameters.name: min_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: min_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of network slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of network slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma separated list of sort criteria. Prefix with - for descending, + (or nothing) for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, active_schemas, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

200.description: Successful response with list of Trust Registries

get.description: Retrieve current system parameters for Trust Registry

200.description: Successful response with Trust Registry parameters

get.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a Trust Registry, showing all changes ordered by transaction timestamp descending. Returns only changed values in the changes field.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Trust Registry ID to retrieve history for

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default: 64)

parameters.name: transaction_timestamp_older_than
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to paginate results. Returns only activities with timestamps older than this value.

200.description: Successful response with Trust Registry activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve a specific Credential Schema by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Credential Schema ID to retrieve

200.description: Successful response with Credential Schema details

get.description: Retrieve the JSON Schema definition for a specific Credential Schema

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Credential Schema ID to retrieve JSON Schema for

200.description: Successful response. Returns the JSON Schema definition as a JSON object.

schema.description: Credential schema JSON Schema definition (with $id overridden by indexer).

example.error: JSON Schema not found for Credential Schema: 3

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Credential Schemas with optional filtering

parameters.name: only_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status. If true, returns only active schemas (archived is null). If false or omitted, returns all schemas (both active and archived). Active/inactive is determined by the archived field.

parameters.name: issuer_onboarding_mode
parameters.description: Filter by issuer onboarding mode . Values may be v3 short names or v4 *_PROCESS names — normalized when filtering.

parameters.name: verifier_onboarding_mode
parameters.description: Filter by verifier onboarding mode . Values may be v3 short names or v4 *_PROCESS names — normalized when filtering.

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return in the response

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sort criteria. Prefix with '-' for descending, '+' or nothing for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: Participant account. Schemas whose TR corporation matches or where the account holds an active permission.

parameters.name: min_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: min_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of network slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of network slash events (exclusive).

200.description: Successful response with list of Credential Schemas

get.description: Retrieve current system parameters for Credential Schemas

200.description: Successful response with Credential Schema parameters

get.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a Credential Schema, showing all changes ordered by transaction timestamp descending. Returns only changed values in the changes field.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Credential Schema ID to retrieve history for

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default: 64)

parameters.name: transaction_timestamp_older_than
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to paginate results. Returns only activities with timestamps older than this value.

200.description: Successful response with Credential Schema activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve a specific Permission by its ID

200.description: Successful response with Permission details

get.description: Retrieve a specific Permission Session by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Permission Session ID to retrieve

200.description: Successful response with Permission Session details

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Permissions with extensive filtering options

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: perm_state
parameters.description: Filter by permission state (calculated based on repaid, slashed, revoked, and effective dates)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sort criteria, prefixed with - for descending, and + (or nothing) for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

parameters.name: min_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: min_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of network slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of network slash events (exclusive).

200.description: Successful response with list of Permissions

get.description: Return pending tasks for a given account grouped by Trust Registry and Credential Schema. Supports At-Block-Height header for historical state.

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of trust registries to return

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sort criteria. Prefix with '-' for descending, '+' or nothing for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

200.description: Successful response with pending tasks grouped by trust registry and credential schema

get.description: Return global current metrics across all Trust Registries and Credential Schemas. Supports At-Block-Height header for historical state.

200.description: Global metrics

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Permission Sessions

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

200.description: Successful response with list of Permission Sessions

get.description: Find permission beneficiaries based on issuer and verifier permissions

200.description: Successful response with beneficiary permissions

example.error: No beneficiaries found for issuer_perm_id: 1 and verifier_perm_id: 2

get.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a Permission, showing all changes ordered by transaction timestamp descending. Returns only changed values in the changes field.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Permission ID whose history will be returned

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default: 64)

parameters.name: transaction_timestamp_older_than
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to paginate results. Returns only activities with timestamps older than this value.

200.description: Successful response with Permission activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve the recorded history for a specific Permission Session ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Permission Session ID to fetch history for

200.description: Successful response with Permission Session activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve a specific statistics entry by ID or by granularity, timestamp, entity_type, and entity_id

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Granularity of the statistics (HOUR, DAY, or MONTH)

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Type of entity (GLOBAL, TRUST_REGISTRY, CREDENTIAL_SCHEMA, PERMISSION)

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: ID of the entity (required for non-GLOBAL entity types)

200.description: Successful response with statistics entry

get.description: Retrieve statistics with buckets and/or totals for a time range. If granularity is not specified, the method returns the smallest number of buckets by combining MONTH/DAY/HOUR buckets as needed. The response `granularity` will be the smallest granularity present in the returned buckets.

parameters.name: entity_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated entity IDs (e.g. '1,2,3'). Must be empty for GLOBAL; required for other entity types.

parameters.name: result_type
parameters.description: BUCKETS, TOTAL, or BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL. Default: BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL.

200.description: Successful response with statistics

get.description: Returns the number of participants for a given entity (GLOBAL, TRUST_REGISTRY, CREDENTIAL_SCHEMA, or PERMISSION) and role type at a specific block height, based on the entity_participant_changes log.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Entity ID (required for non-GLOBAL entity_kind; must be omitted for GLOBAL)

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Block height at which to evaluate participants

200.description: Participants count at the requested height

value.description: Number of participants at the given height

get.description: Retrieve trust deposit information for a specific corporation address .

parameters.name: corporation
parameters.description: Corporation  address for the trust deposit

200.description: Successful response with trust deposit details

example.error: No trust deposit found for corporation: verana1sxau0xyttphpck7vhlvt8s82ez70nlzw2mhya0

get.description: Retrieve current system parameters for Trust Deposit module

200.description: Successful response with Trust Deposit parameters

get.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a Trust Deposit, showing all changes ordered by transaction timestamp descending. Returns only changed values in the changes field.

parameters.name: corporation
parameters.description: Corporation  address to retrieve trust deposit history for

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default: 64)

parameters.name: transaction_timestamp_older_than
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to paginate results. Returns only activities with timestamps older than this value.

200.description: Successful response with Trust Deposit activity timeline

example.error: No trust deposit found for corporation: verana1sxau0xyttphpck7vhlvt8s82ez70nlzw2mhya0

get.description: Returns the cached trust evaluation result for a DID. Use `detail=full` for the complete evaluation tree. `at` is an optional ISO 8601 datetime or block height for point-in-time queries (capped to the last processed trust block).

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime or block height for point-in-time query.

200.description: OK — body is `TrustQ1Summary` or `TrustQ1Full` per `detail`.

404.description: No trust row for this DID at the effective height

get.description: Verifies whether a DID holds an active ISSUER permission for a given VTJSC (credential schema). Optionally validates a payment session.

parameters.name: vtjscId
parameters.description: VTJSC (JSON Schema ID) of the credential.

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime or block height for point-in-time query.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Optional PermissionSession ID for fee payment.

200.description: OK

get.description: Verifies whether a DID holds an active VERIFIER permission for a given VTJSC (credential schema). Optionally validates a payment session.

parameters.name: vtjscId
parameters.description: VTJSC (JSON Schema ID) of the credential.

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime or block height for point-in-time query.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Optional PermissionSession ID for fee payment.

200.description: OK

get.description: Returns all active permissions a DID holds within a specific ecosystem (Trust Registry).

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime or block height for point-in-time query.

200.description: OK

post.description: Forces DID resolution + VP dereferencing + trust evaluation, bypassing TTL behavior. The response reflects only the last processed trust block (lastProcessedBlock).

200.description: OK — refresh triggered

412.description: Trust resolver has not finished the current indexed height yet (lastProcessedBlock is behind).

get.description: Return the latest block height that has been fully processed by the trust resolver pipeline.

200.description: Current trust-resolved block height

height.description: The latest block height that has been fully processed by the indexer

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the checkpoint was last updated (ISO 8601 format without milliseconds)

At-Block-Height.name: At-Block-Height
At-Block-Height.description: Header to query historical state at a specific block height. When provided, returns the state as it was when the specified block finished processing. When omitted, returns the latest indexed state. Must be a positive integer not exceeding the current indexed block height.

event_type.description: Transaction action name, such as CreateNewTrustRegistry, UpdateCredentialSchema, or StartPermissionVP.

participants.description: Current number of active participants (perm_state=ACTIVE) in this Trust Registry

active_schemas.description: Current number of active schema (not archived) in this Trust Registry

archived_schemas.description: Current number of archived schemas in this Trust Registry

weight.description: Trust deposit value (sum) of the full permission tree of all the Credential Schemas of this Trust Registry since it was created. Only considers permission deposits, not trust registry or credential schema deposits.

issued.description: Total issued credentials (sum) by all issuers of all the Credential Schemas of this Trust Registry since it was created

verified.description: Total verified credentials (sum) by all verifiers of all the Credential Schemas of this Trust Registry since it was created

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an Ecosystem participant is slashed by Ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

participants.description: Current number of active participants (perm_state=ACTIVE) in this Trust Registry

active_schemas.description: Current number of active schema (not archived) in this Trust Registry

archived_schemas.description: Current number of archived schemas in this Trust Registry

weight.description: Trust deposit value (sum) of the full permission tree of all the Credential Schemas of this Trust Registry since it was created. Only considers permission deposits, not trust registry or credential schema deposits.

issued.description: Total issued credentials (sum) by all issuers of all the Credential Schemas of this Trust Registry since it was created

verified.description: Total verified credentials (sum) by all verifiers of all the Credential Schemas of this Trust Registry since it was created

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an Ecosystem participant is slashed by Ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

json_schema.description: The exact JSON Schema document as stored from the blockchain (preserves formatting for SRI digest verification). Returned as-is; do not parse or re-serialize.

participants.description: Current number of active participants (perm_state=ACTIVE) in this Credential Schema

weight.description: Trust deposit value (sum) of the full permission tree of this schema since the schema was created

issued.description: Total issued credentials (sum) by all issuers of this Credential Schema since it was created

verified.description: Total verified credentials (sum) by all verifiers of this Credential Schema since it was created

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an ecosystem participant is slashed by ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

perm_state.description: The current state of the permission, calculated based on repaid, slashed, revoked, effective_from, and effective_until fields

corporation_available_actions.description: Actions available to the permission corporation

weight.description: The node weight of the permission, calculated as the sum of all trust deposits of this permission and all permissions in its subtree

issued.description: Number of credentials issued using this permission and its ancestors

verified.description: Number of credentials verified using this permission and its ancestors

participants.description: Current number of active participants (perm_state=ACTIVE) (subtree, plus this permission if it is ACTIVE)

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an ecosystem participant is slashed by ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

corporation.description: Permission corporation at this history point
Corporation  key for this trust deposit

deposit.description: Amount of deposit in native denom

share.description: Share of the module total deposit

block_height.description: Block height when the change occurred

account.description: Account address that made the change

msg.description: Message/action type (e.g., CreateTrustRegistry, AddGovernanceFrameworkDocument, CreateRootPermission, CreateOrUpdatePermissionSession, AdjustTrustDeposit)

changes.description: Object containing the changed fields and their values. The structure varies by message type.

activity.description: List of activity items ordered by timestamp descending

trust_deposit_share_value.description: Value of each trust deposit share

trust_deposit_reclaim_burn_rate.description: Burn rate for reclaimed trust deposits

event_type.description: Type of event that caused this history record

height.description: Block height when this change occurred

created_at.description: When this history record was created

slash_count.description: Number of slash events for this schema

run_as_validator_vps.description: Number of validation processes run as validator

run_as_applicant_vps.description: Number of validation processes run as applicant

entity_id.description: ID of the entity (null for GLOBAL)

granularity.description: Effective granularity used for the response

entity_ids.description: Comma-separated list of entity IDs (e.g. '1,2,3') or repeated query params. Must be empty for GLOBAL.

buckets.description: Time buckets (present if result_type is BUCKETS or BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL)

total.description: Aggregated totals (present if result_type is TOTAL or BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL)

trust_registries.description: Trust registries with nested credential schemas and enriched permission rows (see implementation for full permission fields).

TrustHealthEmbedded.description: Trust checkpoint, indexer height, lag, poll interval, TTL fields, VPR base URL.

vprIndexerBaseUrl.description: Indexer `/verana` base URL used for VPR-backed HTTP calls.

trustEvaluationTtlSeconds.description: Trust TTL (seconds); drives `expiresAt` hints on resolve.

dereferenceCacheTtlSeconds.description: Declared object cache TTL (seconds), or null.

TrustQ1Full.description: `detail=full` response: adds `credentials` and `failedCredentials`. Raw JSON: POST /verana/resolver/v1/refresh.

credentials.description: Valid credential entries from stored evaluation.

fees.description: When `required` is true, includes `paid` after session validation; amounts are **uvna** strings.

example.error: Invalid parameter: response_max_size must be between 1 and 1024

tags.name: Indexer
tags.description: Indexer state and changes tracking operations

tags.name: Resolver
tags.description: Resolver: resolve, issuer/verifier checks, ecosystem participant, refresh.

tags.name: Statistics
tags.description: Statistics operations for querying cumulative and delta metrics across different granularities (HOUR, DAY, MONTH) and entity types (GLOBAL, TRUST_REGISTRY, CREDENTIAL_SCHEMA, PERMISSION)

## WebSocket Events

The same path supports the legacy global stream and the DID-specific room.

### All events
Connect to `ws://localhost:3001/verana/indexer/v1/events` without a `did` query parameter. The first message is `connected`, followed by the legacy `block-indexed` object. This object shape is kept backward compatible:
```json
{
  "type": "block-indexed",
  "height": 123456,
  "timestamp": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z"
}
```
Required fields: `type`, `height`, `timestamp`.

### DID room
Connect to `ws://localhost:3001/verana/indexer/v1/events?did=<DID>`. The first message is `connected` and includes `did` and `block_height`. Use `GET /verana/indexer/v1/events?did=<DID>&after_block_height=<height>&limit=<n>` to replay missed persisted events.

Live DID events use this shape:
```json
{
  "type": "indexer-event",
  "event_type": "StartPermissionVP",
  "did": "did:web:agent.example",
  "block_height": 123456,
  "tx_hash": "A1B2C3",
  "timestamp": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "module": "permission",
    "action": "StartPermissionVP",
    "message_type": "/verana.perm.v1.MsgStartPermissionVP",
    "tx_index": 0,
    "message_index": 0,
    "sender": "did:web:agent.example",
    "related_dids": ["did:web:agent.example"],
    "entity_type": "Permission",
    "entity_id": "42"
  }
}
```
Required fields: `type`, `event_type`, `did`, `block_height`, `tx_hash`, `timestamp`, `payload`.

Manual tests:
```bash
node --import=tsx test/manual/test-websocket.ts
DID=did:web:agent.example AFTER_BLOCK_HEIGHT=123456 node --import=tsx test/manual/test-websocket-did-room.ts
```
